message.content:
In the oa-frontend project at D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-frontend, find the component that handles the "系统配置" (system configuration) page, specifically the dialog/modal for editing config values like "日报AI助手白名单". Look for:
1. The component file that renders this dialog with tags and an input field
2. The "新增" (add) button handler that adds names to the tag list
3. Any split/parse logic for the input value

Search thoroughly in both src/ and vue3-upgrade/ directories. Look for keywords like "白名单", "系统配置", "configValue", "tag", "新增" etc.
